auth.signInError: Unable to sign in. Please check your credentials.

auth.welcomeBackSubtitle: Sign in to continue discovering and matching.

auth.validEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.

location.title: Matches work best when we know where you are.
location.subtitle: Allow current location so Fetcht can surface pets around you instead of showing a generic city list.
location.permissionRequired: Location permission is required to discover pets near you.
location.defaultStatus: We use your current location to keep matches nearby and relevant.
location.savingLocation: Saving your location for local matching...
location.needPermission: We still need your location permission before showing nearby matches.

profile.title: Tell us about yourself
profile.subtitle: Other pet parents will see your name and photo.
profile.birthDatePrivacy: Birth date stays private and is used only for age verification.

pets.title: Create a profile pets would actually swipe right on.
pets.subtitle: Set species, breed, hobbies, energy level, and photos in a way that feels easy to scan.
pets.petBioPlaceholder: Tell other pet parents about your pet's personality
pets.photoRequired: Please add at least one pet photo.
pets.fixFields: Please fix the highlighted fields and try again.
pets.validPetAge: Please enter a valid pet age.
pets.petBioMinLength: Pet bio should be at least 12 characters.
pets.selectHobbiesSubtitle: Choose as many hobbies as you want, then tap Done.
pets.selectCharactersSubtitle: Pick traits that best describe your pet's personality.

home.title: Home
home.emptyFeedDescription: Share the first post from your pet world and it will appear here.

match.title: Discover
match.noMatchesDescription: Keep swiping to find the perfect playmate for your pet.

tutorial.welcomeDesc: Find perfect playmates for your pet. Swipe through profiles and discover pets nearby who share your vibe.
tutorial.swipeRightDesc: See a pet you like? Swipe right or tap the heart button. If they like you back, it's a match!
tutorial.swipeLeftDesc: Not the right fit? Swipe left to skip. No worries — there are always more pets to discover.
tutorial.matchChatDesc: When both pets like each other, you get a match! Start a conversation and plan your first meetup.

celebration.matchDescription: {{myPet}} and {{matchedPet}} like each other! Start a conversation now.
celebration.matchDescriptionGeneric: Your pets like each other! Start a conversation now.

petSelect.chooseWhichPet: Choose which pet to discover with

discover.title: Explore
discover.noVenues: No nearby spots or events yet.
discover.addPetFirstCheckIn: Add a pet first to check in.
discover.addPetFirstJoin: Add a pet first to join.
discover.selectAtLeastOnePet: Select at least one pet to check in.

care.title: Care
care.subtitle: Everything your pet needs in one place
care.addPetFirstDescription: Go to Profile and add your first pet to unlock all care features.

profile.title: Profile
profile.noPetsDescription: Add your first pet to unlock discovery, matches, and chat.
profile.addFirstPetDescription: Register your pet to unlock discovery, matching, and all the fun features Fetcht has to offer.

notificationSettings.title: Notification settings
notificationSettings.subtitle: Choose which push notifications Petto sends you. Per-conversation mute in chat still applies on top of these.
notificationSettings.footnote: You can always mute a specific chat or playdate from its header.

matches.title: Matches & likes
matches.subtitle: New mutual matches and likes on your pets.

messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: DMs, group chats, and playdate chat messages.

chat.noConversationsDescription: Match with pets and start chatting with their owners.

report.title: Report
report.updated: Your report reason has been updated.

diary.title: Pet Diary
diary.noEntriesDescription: Tap the + button to add your first diary entry for your pet.

feeding.title: Feeding Schedule
feeding.noSchedulesDescription: Tap the + button to create a feeding schedule.

health.title: Health Records
health.noRecordsDescription: Tap the + button to add your first health record.

weight.title: Weight Tracking
weight.noEntriesDescription: Tap the + button to log your pet's weight.

adoption.title: Adopt
adoption.findFriendDescription: Thousands of pets are waiting for their forever home. Browse profiles, fall in love, and give a pet the life they deserve.
adoption.everyPetDescription: Shelters and pet parents list animals looking for loving families. Each profile includes photos, personality traits, and contact info.
adoption.readyToAdoptDescription: Browse available pets, connect with their current caregivers, and start your adoption journey today.
adoption.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell potential adopters about this pet...
adoption.noListingsDescription: Check back later or create a listing to help a pet find a new home.
adoption.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this listing? This action cannot be undone.
adoption.markAdoptedConfirmMessage: Has this pet been adopted? This will update the listing status.

groups.title: Community Groups
groups.noGroupsDescription: Community groups will appear here as they are created.
groups.noNearbyGroups: No groups in your area yet
groups.noMyGroupsDescription: Join groups to connect with other pet owners.
groups.forWhichPet: Which pet is this group for?
groups.codeGeneratedNote: A 6-character join code will be generated automatically
groups.createError: Could not create group. Please try again.
groups.joinToChatBody: Join this group to chat with other owners and get the invite code.
groups.inviteCodeHint: Share this code with friends so they can join the group.
groups.lastAdminWarning: You are the last admin. Leaving will delete this group permanently.
groups.confirmLeaveBody: You will stop receiving messages and will need the invite code to join again.
groups.confirmDeleteBody: You are the last admin. Leaving will permanently delete the group, including all messages. This cannot be undone.
groups.confirmMuteBody: {{name}} won't be able to send messages until you unmute them.
groups.groupDeletedBody: The group was deleted because you were the last admin.
groups.youAreMuted: You are muted in this group
groups.tapToManage: Tap a member to manage permissions.

playdates.title: Playdates
playdates.noPlaydatesDescription: Tap the + button to organize a playdate for your pets.
playdates.errorLoading: Couldn't load playdates. Pull down to retry.
playdates.locationDeniedBanner: Showing all playdates — enable location to see nearby ones.

detail.announceHint: Send a message to everyone who joined.
detail.announcePlaceholder: Share an update with your attendees…
detail.announceSentBody: Your message has been posted to the playdate chat.
detail.waitlistAddedBody: You'll be auto-promoted when a spot opens.
detail.fullBanner: This playdate is full — join the waitlist below.
detail.lockedAttendeesBody: The full attendee list unlocks once you join the playdate.
detail.emptyAttendees: No attendees yet — be the first to join!
detail.confirmLeaveBody: You'll be removed from the attendee list and the chat.
detail.confirmCancelBody: Everyone who joined will be notified. This cannot be undone.
detail.selectPetsHint: Choose one or more pets to join with.
detail.editPetsHint: Add or remove pets attending this playdate.
detail.noPetsBody: Add a pet to your profile so you can join playdates.
detail.waitlistNoticeBody: Your pets will be added to the waitlist and auto-promoted when a spot opens.
detail.editFailedBody: Please try again or reduce the number of pets.
detail.privateHostBanner: This is a private playdate. Only invited guests can see it.
detail.privateInviteeBanner: You've been invited to this private playdate.

wizard.dateTooSoon: Pick a time at least 1 hour from now.
wizard.noVenues: No matching venues. Try another search.
wizard.visibilityPublicHint: Anyone nearby can discover and join.
wizard.coverPhotoHint: Pick a photo that captures the vibe. Venue image used as fallback.

invites.title: Invite friends
invites.subtitle: Pick people from your Petto contacts.
invites.emptyBody: Swipe to match with other pet owners first — then you can invite them from here. For now, share the link below.
invites.externalHint: Use WhatsApp, Messages, or any app to share a join link.
invites.errorBody: Please try again in a moment.

chat.joinToSend: Join this playdate to send messages.
chat.youAreMuted: You've been muted by the host.
chat.rateLimitHit: Sending too fast — slow down a bit.

hostTools.title: Host tools
hostTools.subtitle: Manage this playdate and its attendees.
hostTools.editDetailsHint: Change title, date, venue, or rules before it starts.
hostTools.sendAnnouncementHint: Pinned in chat and posted to the timeline.
hostTools.inviteFriendsHint: Pick people from your Petto contacts.
hostTools.lockHint: Stop new joins without showing a badge to users.
hostTools.transferOwnershipHint: Hand the host role to another attendee.
hostTools.cancelPlaydateHint: Notify everyone and remove from discovery.
hostTools.transferEmpty: No other attendees to transfer to yet.
hostTools.transferConfirmBody: {{name}} will become the new host immediately.
hostTools.transferSuccessBody: The new host now controls this playdate.
hostTools.kickConfirmBody: {{name}} will be removed silently and the chat won't show a notice.

myPlaydates.title: My playdates
myPlaydates.emptyUpcomingBody: Join a playdate nearby or host your own to see it here.
myPlaydates.emptyHostedBody: You haven't hosted a playdate yet. Tap the + button on the playdates screen to start one.
myPlaydates.emptyPastBody: Your attended and hosted playdates will appear here once they're over.

vets.title: Nearby Vets
vets.locationNeededDescription: Enable location permissions to find nearby vet clinics.
vets.noClinicsDescription: No veterinary clinics found in your area. Try again later.

petSitters.title: Pet Sitters
petSitters.noSittersDescription: Pet sitter profiles will appear here once available in your area.
petSitters.contactMessage: Hi {{name}}, I found you on Fetcht and would like to inquire about your pet sitting services.

editPet.title: Edit {{name}}
editPet.selectCompatibilitySubtitle: Pick what your pet is good with.

weather.sunny: Perfect for a park walk with your pet!
weather.windy: A light walk, but watch for debris.
weather.hot: Keep your pet hydrated, stay in shade.
weather.cold: Bundle up for a short stroll.

petCard.scanQrCode: Scan this QR code to view {{name}}'s profile on Fetcht
petCard.shareMessage: Check out {{name}} on Fetcht! {{species}} - {{breed}}. Download Fetcht to find playmates for your pet.

discoveryDeck.addPetFirstDescription: You need at least one pet profile to start discovering other pets.
discoveryDeck.checkBackLater: Check back later for new pets in your area.
